rule_name: Enhanced Screening Frequency for High-Risk Customers
description: High-risk customers must be rescreened against sanctions and PEP/adverse media sources at least every 90 days instead of annually.
trigger_condition: Refresh required when a customer is rated High and the most recent screening is older than 90 days.

rule_name: Reduced Acceptable ID Validity Window for UK Customers
description: For UK-resident customers, identity documents with less than 6 months remaining validity can no longer be accepted for periodic review.
trigger_condition: Refresh required when jurisdiction is UK and the primary ID expiry date is within 180 days or already expired.

rule_name: Enhanced Beneficial Ownership Verification for Offshore Structures
description: Offshore legal entities must evidence beneficial owners at 25 percent or more with verification refreshed every 24 months and corroborated by corporate registry extracts.
trigger_condition: Refresh required when entity_type is LEGAL_ENTITY, jurisdiction is Offshore, and any UBO verification is older than 24 months or UBO information is missing.

description: Customers booked in the EU must maintain proof of address dated within the prior 24 months for ongoing due diligence.
trigger_condition: Refresh required when jurisdiction is EU and no acceptable Proof of Address is on file within the last 24 months.
